    1. getWhen()

Interface Temporal<T>

Type Parameters:
T - The type of the temporal coordinate (e.g., Instant, TimeCoordinate).
All Known Subinterfaces:
TimeCoordinate
All Known Implementing Classes:
Artifact, Artist, Artwork, Book, Building, Building, BusinessPlace, CalendarCoordinate, Candidate, Choreography, Citizen, City, City, Clothes, Composition, Conflict, Country, Creature, Defendant, Doctor, EconomicAgent, Election, Event, Film, Fossil, FuzzyTimeInterval, FuzzyTimePoint, Gas, GeologicalEra, HistoricalEra, HistoricalEvent, Home, HumanResource, Installation, Item, Judge, JuryMember, Lawyer, Liquid, Locutor, Machine, MasterOfCeremony, Match, MaterialResource, Member, Mineral, Natural, Organigram, OwnedPlace, Patient, Performance, PhysicalObject, Picture, Place, Plaintiff, PositionedEvent, Prosecutor, Region, Resource, ResponsibleIndividual, Road, Robot, Role, Settlement, Site, Solid, Thing, TimedBoundary.BoundaryState, TimedPlace, TimeInterval, TimePoint, Tool, Vehicle, Vehicle, Voter, Witness, Worker
public interface Temporal<T>
Interface for objects that have a temporal position. Analogous to Positioned.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    T
    getWhen()
    Returns the temporal position (when) of this entity.

  • Method Details

    • getWhen

      T getWhen()
      Returns the temporal position (when) of this entity.
      Returns:
      the temporal position.
